name: Fettucine with Shrimp and Scallions (Ginger Chili Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons fresh ginger root, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a medium pan of water to a boil, allowing 5 to 10 minutes for the water to come to a rolling boil.
2. Finely chop ginger, green onions, and pecan pieces in a food processor until smooth.
3. In a bowl, combine chili sauce (e.g., Heinz), soy sauce, crushed garlic, and dark sesame oil.
4. Clean shrimp and remove tails before cooking.
5. When the water is boiling, add fettuccine and simmer for 2 to 3 minutes until tender but still chewy.
6. Heat wok and peanut oil (or canola oil) in a separate pan.
7. Add the processed ingredients into the hot oil.
8. Add shrimp to the hot oil and cook until heated through.
9. Drain the pasta, then add it to the wok with the chili sauce mixture.
10. Toss everything together and serve immediately.
'Oh, was that good!' (served with mixed green salad, jicama chips, and raspberry vinaigrette.)
